reason: Verify global architecture, implementation stack, and descriptor-boundary invariants are preserved.
Verify RVV route registration remains RVV plugin/target-owned and selected metadata remains bounded.
Verify core/tool code consumes registries instead of hard-coding RVV/scalar route semantics.
Verify target artifact exporter and translate route registration follows the built-in registration boundary and fail-closed route metadata rules.
Verify focused build, C++ tests, lit tests, artifact commands, and RVV evidence match the changed behavior.
